meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: All who enter Helheim must pay the blood price. Resist if you wish... In the end, I always get my payment!
Arise, servitor! Claim our blood debt!
Helya will make you pay... In the end, everyone pays...
If I cannot bleed the payment from you, the spirits will!
Life... death... I am but one ripple in the eternal ebb and flow...
New passengers... New souls. I will guide you to the depths of Helheim for a small price: your flesh and blood.
Now... it is I who must pay... the blood price...
The flesh burdens the soul. A nuisance that must be flayed from your bones!
The spirits grow hungry from the scent of blood.
Bend and break your soul, I'll take.
quotes.transcript: Bend and break your soul, I'll take.

quotes.text: You see now the weakness in your mortal shell?
quotes.transcript: You see now the weakness in your mortal shell?

quotes.text: You wish for passage to Helheim? Then you shall have it! Hahahaha!
quotes.transcript: You wish for passage to Helheim? Then you shall have it! Hahahaha!

quotes.text: As I said, I always get my payments!
quotes.transcript: As I said, I always get my payments!

quotes.text: Another blood debt claimed! Another soul cast into the abyss.
quotes.transcript: Another blood debt claimed! Another soul cast into the abyss.

quotes.text: Everyone must pay the blood price!
quotes.transcript: Everyone must pay the blood price!

quotes.text: Spirits! Sweep these mortals into the tides!
quotes.transcript: Spirits! Sweep these mortals into the tides!

quotes.text: AUAAAAenergetic
quotes.transcript: AUAAAAenergetic

quotes.text: No one rides for free!
quotes.transcript: No one rides for free!

quotes.text: Everyone must pay the blood price!
quotes.transcript: Everyone must pay the blood price!

quotes.text: Spirits! Sweep these mortals into the tides!
quotes.transcript: Spirits! Sweep these mortals into the tides!

quotes.text: Continuing to drift
quotes.transcript: Continuing to drift

quotes.text: Do you think you have won? You have merely survived the storm... The seas are unstoppable.
Embrace your fate, fools!
I am losing my patience.
I will drown you all like rats.
No! This is not possible!
What manner of creatures ARE you??
You ALL will regret trespassing in my realm.
You have come far enough. Time to die.
You will pay for that.
Your fate rains down!
Your soul will find no shelter here!
quotes.transcript: Your soul will find no shelter here!

quotes.text: Odin values these creatures!
quotes.transcript: Odin values these creatures!

quotes.text: How resourceful you are! You might make a worthwhile plaything yet!
quotes.transcript: How resourceful you are! You might make a worthwhile plaything yet!

quotes.text: Fake Fuss you weak fool! Your torment will be unending!
quotes.transcript: Fake Fuss you weak fool! Your torment will be unending!

quotes.text: Come mortals, you have earned an eternity of torment!
quotes.transcript: Come mortals, you have earned an eternity of torment!

quotes.text: The cold will shatter you!
quotes.transcript: The cold will shatter you!

quotes.text: You will pay for that insult! The skies of your world will be darkened by the wings of my Morsworn!
quotes.transcript: You will pay for that insult! The skies of your world will be darkened by the wings of my Morsworn!

quotes.text: So naive. So blind to Odin's failings.
quotes.transcript: So naive. So blind to Odin's failings.

quotes.text: May it taste like ashes in his throat.
quotes.transcript: May it taste like ashes in his throat.

quotes.text: I will twist every Valkyr you send, Odin. Just as you twisted me so long ago. Your own eye betrays them all. Such sweet irony.
quotes.transcript: I will twist every Valkyr you send, Odin. Just as you twisted me so long ago. Your own eye betrays them all. Such sweet irony.

quotes.text: You are clever outsider, but your efforts will only prove futile.
quotes.transcript: You are clever outsider, but your efforts will only prove futile.

quotes.text: Do not think you are close to winning unworthy one!
quotes.transcript: Do not think you are close to winning unworthy one!

quotes.text: No! My darling pet! You will pay for this!
quotes.transcript: No! My darling pet! You will pay for this!

quotes.text: It is finished. I banish your weak mortal souls forevermore.
quotes.transcript: It is finished. I banish your weak mortal souls forevermore.

quotes.text: Curse you all! Do you really think to conquer my domain? All of Helheim will stand against you!
quotes.transcript: Curse you all! Do you really think to conquer my domain? All of Helheim will stand against you!

quotes.text: Oh no! Odin's mighty champions have come to end my reign! Whatever shall I do?
quotes.transcript: Oh no! Odin's mighty champions have come to end my reign! Whatever shall I do?

quotes.text: Soon you will join the rakes of my K'valdeer!
quotes.transcript: Soon you will join the rakes of my K'valdeer!

quotes.text: Your wretched souls will feed the coming darkness!
quotes.transcript: Your wretched souls will feed the coming darkness!

quotes.text: Your time has long passed, you crepit fool! I will enjoy drowning you!
quotes.transcript: Your time has long passed, you crepit fool! I will enjoy drowning you!

quotes.text: Did you really think you'd escape to my notice?
quotes.transcript: Did you really think you'd escape to my notice?

quotes.text: Your defiance is meaningless! I already have what I need!
quotes.transcript: Your defiance is meaningless! I already have what I need!

quotes.text: Skyja, see them out!
quotes.transcript: Skyja, see them out!

quotes.text: Such insolence! None will leave Helheim while I rule!
quotes.transcript: Such insolence! None will leave Helheim while I rule!

quotes.text: What?! This cannot be!
quotes.transcript: What?! This cannot be!

quotes.text: Unworthy! You will kneel before addressing the great Helia!
quotes.transcript: Unworthy! You will kneel before addressing the great Helia!

quotes.text: Stop squirming!
quotes.transcript: Stop squirming!

quotes.text: Mine! Mine forever!
quotes.transcript: Mine! Mine forever!

quotes.text: Soon the halls of valor will fall. Odin's last days are upon him!
quotes.transcript: Soon the halls of valor will fall. Odin's last days are upon him!

quotes.text: My reign cannot end!
quotes.transcript: My reign cannot end!

quotes.text: Your doom lurks within the fog!
quotes.transcript: Your doom lurks within the fog!

quotes.text: I'll blow you a kiss!
quotes.transcript: I'll blow you a kiss!

quotes.text: Scared now Draxie? The Jailer does not tolerate weakness in his ranks.
quotes.transcript: Scared now Draxie? The Jailer does not tolerate weakness in his ranks.

quotes.text: Take my boon, Viraz! You are outnumbered after all!
quotes.transcript: Take my boon, Viraz! You are outnumbered after all!

quotes.text: Now bear this message back to your master little bird!
quotes.transcript: Now bear this message back to your master little bird!

quotes.text: So this is the champion of Odin. Let them die by Odin's own blades. I bless these weapons with the fury of Helheim. Go, Figfus! Slay the champion and earn my favor for all eternity!
quotes.transcript: So this is the champion of Odin. Let them die by Odin's own blades. I bless these weapons with the fury of Helheim. Go, Figfus! Slay the champion and earn my favor for all eternity!

quotes.text: I grow weary of your presence. Tell Odin that this changes nothing. He will suffer my wrath for ages to come!
quotes.transcript: I grow weary of your presence. Tell Odin that this changes nothing. He will suffer my wrath for ages to come!

quotes.text: Think of this as repayment for your previous insult, Valarjar!
quotes.transcript: Think of this as repayment for your previous insult, Valarjar!

quotes.text: This isn't over, mortal! I will see my blades returned! And your souls suffer in my grasp!
quotes.transcript: This isn't over, mortal! I will see my blades returned! And your souls suffer in my grasp!

quotes.text: No one leaves Helheim! No one!
quotes.transcript: No one leaves Helheim! No one!

quotes.text: Have fun with my pet, outsider! I will enjoy watching him break you!
quotes.transcript: Have fun with my pet, outsider! I will enjoy watching him break you!

quotes.text: Remember our bargain, Benji. Do not dare cross me.
quotes.transcript: Remember our bargain, Benji. Do not dare cross me.

quotes.text: Be gone to the next life!
quotes.transcript: Be gone to the next life!

quotes.text: I have had enough! This ends now!
quotes.transcript: I have had enough! This ends now!

quotes.text: An eternity of agony awaits you!
quotes.transcript: An eternity of agony awaits you!

quotes.text: So kind of you to deliver your souls to me. It will save my Valkyr the trouble of fetching them from the surface world!
quotes.transcript: So kind of you to deliver your souls to me. It will save my Valkyr the trouble of fetching them from the surface world!

quotes.text: Your souls belong to me!
quotes.transcript: Your souls belong to me!

quotes.text: Another soul drowned!
quotes.transcript: Another soul drowned!

quotes.text: Drowning despair, lap dogs of Odin!
quotes.transcript: Drowning despair, lap dogs of Odin!

quotes.text: Odin's fabled champions! Ha! Barely worth my time!
quotes.transcript: Odin's fabled champions! Ha! Barely worth my time!

quotes.text: Damn you, Odin! Damn you!
quotes.transcript: Damn you, Odin! Damn you!

quotes.text: He must not win!
quotes.transcript: He must not win!

quotes.text: Let the shadows take you!
quotes.transcript: Let the shadows take you!

quotes.text: Darkness upon your soul!
quotes.transcript: Darkness upon your soul!

quotes.text: Shiver, tremble, quake!
quotes.transcript: Shiver, tremble, quake!

quotes.text: RELISH THE COLD KISS OF THE SEA!
quotes.transcript: RELISH THE COLD KISS OF THE SEA!

quotes.text: Tachy Tachy!
quotes.transcript: Tachy Tachy!

quotes.text: Do I have your attention?
quotes.transcript: Do I have your attention?

quotes.text: Your efforts are for not mortals! Odin will never be free!
quotes.transcript: Your efforts are for not mortals! Odin will never be free!

quotes.text: Behold my army of the damned!
quotes.transcript: Behold my army of the damned!

quotes.text: You'll catch your death of cold!
quotes.transcript: You'll catch your death of cold!

quotes.text: Breathe deep and despair!
quotes.transcript: Breathe deep and despair!

quotes.text: BREAK UPON THE WAVES!
quotes.transcript: BREAK UPON THE WAVES!

quotes.text: Good. Our allies are eager to strike.
quotes.transcript: Good. Our allies are eager to strike.

quotes.text: Leave your plaything, my pet! There is work to be done!
quotes.transcript: Leave your plaything, my pet! There is work to be done!

quotes.text: Take his power, Lasunia. Use him to fuel your transformation.
quotes.transcript: Take his power, Lasunia. Use him to fuel your transformation.

quotes.text: Do not fail me, Lasonia. Prove that you are worthy of your newfound power.
quotes.transcript: Do not fail me, Lasonia. Prove that you are worthy of your newfound power.

quotes.text: It seems you have guests. Paragon. Do take care of them.
quotes.transcript: It seems you have guests. Paragon. Do take care of them.

quotes.text: Drown! Drown among the souls of the damned!
quotes.transcript: Drown! Drown among the souls of the damned!

quotes.text: Tear that necropolis out of the sky! Drag it down!
quotes.transcript: Tear that necropolis out of the sky! Drag it down!

quotes.text: Underling? Hell yeah is no one's underling. I will not be silenced! I will not be imprisoned! My wrath shall hodge your...
quotes.transcript: Underling? Hell yeah is no one's underling. I will not be silenced! I will not be imprisoned! My wrath shall hodge your...

quotes.text: HEEYAAAAAAK!
quotes.transcript: HEEYAAAAAAK!

quotes.text: All hands on deck!
Belay these bilge rats!
No prey, no pay. Now secure the Naglfar!
No quarter to these scallywags! Helya doesn't abide intruders.
Nothing sweeter... than to die at sea...
This be... my final plunder...
CRAVEN MAGGOTS!
Know the bitter chill of death as I have!
Mortals... Your wretched kind murdered MY people... destroyed MY kingdom! Long have I waited for a chance to repay what was done to me!
Not... again... HARBARON! CAST THEIR SOULS INTO THE TIDES!
The shadows of Helheim cut deeper than steel!
The shadows of the underworld bend to me!
You have not won... The Naglfar comes... for you...
You have not won... You have only... secured your own doom...
Your souls will drift for eternity in the tides of the underworld!
quotes.transcript: Your souls will drift for eternity in the tides of the underworld.

quotes.text: Another drop in the sea of souls!
quotes.transcript: Another drop in the sea of souls.

quotes.text: FLEE, COWARDS!
quotes.transcript: FLEET COWARDS!

quotes.text: COWER BEFORE ME!
quotes.transcript: CREATE BEFORE ME!

quotes.text: The winds of the frozen north still howl in these veins!!
quotes.transcript: The winds of the frozen north still howl in these veins!

quotes.text: PAYBACK!
quotes.transcript: PAY BACK!

quotes.text: I have learned from my past defeats... It seems you have not.
quotes.transcript: I have learned from my past defeats. It seems you have not.

quotes.text: If the Legion does not kill you, someday I will!
quotes.transcript: If the Legion does not kill you, someday I will!

quotes.text: CASH YOU! CASH YOUR MOTHER! I WILL F*** MAKE YOUR F***ING END DOWN! DOWN YOUR F***ING THROAT! YOU F***ING OLDEN EPSELF WITH F***ING YOUR DEDACROUND!
quotes.transcript: CASH YOU! CASH YOUR MOTHER! I WILL F*** MAKE YOUR F***ING END DOWN! DOWN YOUR F***ING THROAT! YOU F***ING OLDEN EPSELF WITH F***ING YOUR DEDACROUND!

quotes.text: Bewh... Subscribe for more!
quotes.transcript: Bewh... Subscribe for more!

quotes.text: I will carve a new crown from your bones!
quotes.transcript: I will carve a new crown from your bones!

quotes.text: N Greetings!
quotes.transcript: N Greetings!

quotes.text: My hatred burns.
quotes.transcript: My hatred burns.

quotes.text: I'm in speed on your grave!
quotes.transcript: I'm in speed on your grave!

quotes.text: I hate you damn gods!
quotes.transcript: I hate you damn gods!

quotes.text: Mortals, your wretched kind murdered my people! Destroyed my kingdom! Now you too will know what it feels like to lose everything!
quotes.transcript: Mortals, your wretched kind murdered my people! Destroyed my kingdom! Now you too will know what it feels like to lose everything!

quotes.text: Mortals, I fell to your wretched kind once before. It will not happen again.
quotes.transcript: Mortals, I fell to your wretched kind once before. It will not happen again.

quotes.text: No! No! I am King Ymiron! I am not a servant!
quotes.transcript: No! No! I am King Ymiron! I am not a servant!

quotes.text: Kept it over with already!
quotes.transcript: Kept it over with already!

quotes.text: If the Legion does not kill you, someday I will!
quotes.transcript: If the Legion does not kill you, someday I will!

quotes.text: Leave me be already!
quotes.transcript: Leave me be already!

quotes.text: I would die a thousand deaths to see you suffer!
quotes.transcript: I would die a thousand deaths to see you suffer!

quotes.text: Why couldn't you let me die?
quotes.transcript: Why couldn't you let me die?
